meaning: n.住处,住院医生实习期,住院医生的职位,高级训练(阶段)
examples: She has been granted permanent residency in Britain.
You can apply for citizenship after five years' residency.
What makes residency particularly tricky is that each state has its own set of rules.
But they did enjoy special dispensations for long-term residency status and big breaks on housing.
